howItWorks.intro: This openai api cost calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.
rules: Monthly Cost = (Input Cost + Output Cost) × Requests × Days
howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates. Consult a professional for critical decisions.

faq.question: How much does GPT-4o cost?
faq.answer: GPT-4o costs $2.50 per million input tokens and $10 per million output tokens. GPT-4o Mini is significantly cheaper at $0.15/$0.60 per million tokens.

faq.question: GPT-4o vs Claude Sonnet which is cheaper?
faq.answer: GPT-4o at $2.50/$10 per MTok is slightly cheaper than Claude Sonnet at $3/$15 for input but more expensive for output. Total cost depends on your input/output ratio.
